name: 間
description: Indicates a period of time during which something happens; while, during, between

name: 間に
description: Indicates that something happens during a specific time period; while/during something happened

name: あまり～ない
description: Used with negative verbs to express 'not very' or 'not much'

name: 後で
description: Indicates that something happens after another action; after, later

name: ば
description: Conditional form expressing 'if A then B'; used for hypothetical situations

name: 場合は
description: Expresses 'in the event of' or 'in the case that'; used for specific circumstances

name: ばかり
description: Indicates 'only' or 'nothing but'; emphasizes exclusivity or repetition

name: だけで
description: Expresses 'just by' or 'just by doing'; indicates a simple action produces a result

name: 出す
description: Attached to verb stems to indicate suddenly beginning an action or sudden appearance

name: でございます
description: Extremely polite form of です; honorific way to say 'to be'

name: でも
description: Attached to nouns to suggest 'or something'; indicates a non-exhaustive example

name: ではないか
description: Rhetorical question form meaning 'right?' or 'isn't it?'; seeks confirmation

name: が必要
description: Expresses necessity; 'need' or 'necessary'

name: がする
description: Used with sensory experiences to express smell, sound, or taste

name: がり
description: Indicates personality traits or tendencies; sensitivity towards something

name: がる・がっている
description: Shows signs of feeling or emotion; to appear to feel or think something

name: ございます
description: Extremely polite form of いる/ある; honorific way to express existence

name: 始める
description: Attached to verb stems to indicate starting or beginning an action

name: はずだ
description: Expresses expectation or logical conclusion; 'it must be' or 'it should be'

name: はずがない
description: Expresses impossibility or strong disbelief; 'cannot be' or 'impossible'

name: 必要がある
description: Expresses necessity; 'need to' or 'it is necessary to'

name: 意向形
description: Volitional form expressing intention or suggestion; 'let's do' or 'shall we'

name: いらっしゃる
description: Honorific form of いる/来る/行く; polite way to say 'to be/come/go'

name: いたします
description: Humble polite form of する; 'to do' in respectful language

name: じゃないか
description: Casual form seeking confirmation or making suggestions; 'right?' or 'let's'

name: かどうか
description: Expresses uncertainty; 'whether or not'

name: かしら
description: Feminine sentence ending expressing wonder or uncertainty; 'I wonder'

name: かい
description: Casual masculine question particle; turns statements into yes/no questions

name: かもしれない
description: Expresses possibility or uncertainty; 'might' or 'perhaps'

name: かな
description: Sentence ending expressing wonder or uncertainty; 'I wonder' or 'should I?'

name: から作る
description: Indicates materials or ingredients used to make something; 'made from/with'

name: きっと
description: Adverb expressing strong probability; 'surely' or 'almost certainly'

name: 頃
description: Indicates approximate time; 'around' or 'about' a certain time

name: こと
description: Nominalizes verbs, turning them into noun phrases

name: ことがある
description: Expresses occasional occurrence; 'there are times when' or 'sometimes'

name: ことができる
description: Expresses ability or possibility; 'can' or 'able to'

name: ことになる
description: Indicates a decision made by circumstances; 'it has been decided that' or 'it turns out that'

name: ことにする
description: Indicates making a personal decision; 'to decide on'

name: くする
description: Makes i-adjectives into verbs meaning 'to make something adjective'

name: 急に
description: Adverb meaning 'suddenly' or 'all of a sudden'

name: までに
description: Indicates a time limit or deadline by which something must be completed

name: まま
description: Expresses maintaining a current state or condition without changing

name: または
description: Indicates a choice between two or more options, meaning 'or' or 'otherwise'

name: みたいだ
description: Expresses similarity or resemblance, meaning 'like' or 'similar to'

name: みたいな
description: Adjectival form expressing similarity, used to modify nouns

name: みたいに
description: Adverbial form expressing similarity, used to modify verbs or adjectives

name: も
description: Emphasizes large quantities, meaning 'as many as' or 'as much as'

name: な
description: Prohibitive command form telling someone not to do something

name: など
description: Indicates examples or similar things, meaning 'such as' or 'things like'

name: ながら
description: Expresses simultaneous actions, meaning 'while' or 'during'

name: なかなか～ない
description: Expresses difficulty in achieving something, meaning 'not easy to' or 'struggling to'

name: なければいけない
description: Expresses obligation or necessity, meaning 'must do' or 'have to do'

name: なければならない
description: Expresses strong obligation or necessity, meaning 'must do' or 'have to do'

name: なら
description: Conditional form expressing 'if' or 'in the case that' with emphasis on the topic

name: なさい
description: Polite but firm command form, softer than direct imperative

name: なさる
description: Honorific form of する, used to show respect for the subject's actions

name: に気がつく
description: Expresses noticing or realizing something, often suddenly

name: にみえる
description: Expresses how something appears or seems to the observer

name: にする
description: Expresses making a decision or choice about something

name: にくい
description: Expresses difficulty in doing something, attached to verb stems

name: の中で
description: Expresses location within a group or among options

name: のに
description: Expresses contrast or contradiction, meaning 'although' or 'even though'

name: のに
description: Expresses purpose or necessity, meaning 'in order to' or 'for the purpose of'

name: のは〜だ
description: Emphasizes the reason or explanation for something using nominalization

name: お～ください
description: Honorific request form showing respect to the listener

name: お～になる
description: Honorific form showing respect for the subject's actions

name: おきに
description: Expresses regular intervals or repetition, meaning 'every' or 'at intervals of'

name: 終わる
description: Expresses completion or ending of an action or state

name: られる
description: Potential form expressing ability or possibility to do something

name: らしい
description: Expresses hearsay or conjecture based on information, meaning 'apparently' or 'it seems'

name: さ
description: Nominalizes adjectives to express the degree or quality of something

name: さっき
description: Refers to a recent past time, meaning 'a while ago' or 'just now'

name: させられる
description: Causative-passive form expressing being made to do something against one's will

name: させる
description: Causative form expressing making or letting someone do something

name: させてください
description: Polite request for permission to do something

name: さすが
description: Expresses admiration or that something meets expectations

name: し
description: Connects reasons or adds emphasis, meaning 'and' or 'what's more'

name: そんなに
description: Expresses degree or extent, meaning 'so much' or 'to that extent'

name: それでも
description: Expresses contrast despite circumstances, meaning 'but still' or 'even so'

name: そうだ
description: Expresses hearsay or reported information, meaning 'I heard that' or 'it is said that'

name: そうだ
description: Expresses that something looks like or appears to be a certain way based on visual observation

name: そうに・そうな
description: Adverbial and adjectival forms expressing that something seems like or looks like a certain way

name: たばかり
description: Indicates that something just finished happening or just occurred recently

name: たところ
description: Expresses that something just finished or was just being done at a specific moment

name: 他動詞 & 自動詞
description: Distinction between transitive verbs (taking direct objects) and intransitive verbs (not taking direct objects)

name: たがる
description: Expresses that a third person wants to do something, showing observable desire or intention

name: たら
description: Conditional form expressing 'if', 'after', or 'when' something happens

name: たらどう
description: Suggestion pattern meaning 'why don't you' or 'how about if you' do something

name: たらいいですか
description: Pattern used when seeking instruction or advice, meaning 'what should I do?'

name: て/で
description: Conjunctive particle connecting clauses to show cause and effect or sequence

name: てあげる
description: Expresses doing something for someone else as a favor or act of kindness

name: てほしい
description: Expresses wanting someone to do something, meaning 'I want you to' or 'I need you to'

name: ていく
description: Indicates starting an action or continuing an action into the future

name: ていた
description: Past continuous form expressing that something was being done or was in a state

name: ていただけませんか
description: Very polite way to ask someone to do something, meaning 'could you please'

name: てくれる
description: Expresses that someone does something for the speaker or someone close to the speaker

name: てくる
description: Indicates doing something and coming back, or a continuing change toward the speaker

name: てみる
description: Expresses trying to do something to see what happens or how it feels

name: てもらう
description: Expresses getting someone to do something for you or receiving a favor

name: ておく
description: Expresses doing something in advance or in preparation for something else

name: てしまう / ちゃう
description: Expresses completion of an action, often with regret, or doing something accidentally

name: てすみません
description: Apologetic expression meaning 'I'm sorry for' doing something

name: てやる
description: Casual form of doing something for someone, often used with family or close friends

name: てよかった
description: Expresses relief or satisfaction, meaning 'I'm glad that' something happened

name: ているところ
description: Expresses being in the process of doing something right now

name: ても
description: Expresses 'even if', 'even though', or 'no matter' in conditional situations

name: と
description: Conditional particle expressing that whenever A happens, B naturally follows

name: と言ってもいい
description: Expression meaning 'you could say' or 'one might say' when making a statement

name: という
description: Attributive form meaning 'called', 'named', or 'that' when describing something

name: ということ
description: Nominalizes a phrase or sentence, converting it into a noun phrase

name: と言われている
description: Passive expression meaning 'it is said that' or 'people say that'

name: と聞いた
description: Expression meaning 'I heard that' when reporting information received from others

name: と思う
description: Expression meaning 'I think that' or 'to think that' when expressing opinions or thoughts

name: とか～とか
description: Lists examples meaning 'such as', 'like', or 'among other things'

name: ところ
description: Expresses being just about to do something or on the verge of doing something

name: 続ける
description: Verb meaning to continue doing something or to keep on with an action

name: って
description: Casual quotation particle meaning 'called', 'named', or used to quote what someone said

name: 受身形
description: Passive voice construction where the subject receives the action rather than performing it

name: は〜が… は
description: Contrastive structure showing comparison or contrast between two things using は and が particles

name: やすい
description: Suffix meaning 'easy to', 'likely to', 'prone to', or 'have a tendency to' do something

name: やっと
description: Expresses that something finally happened after a long wait or effort, or that something was barely achieved

name: より
description: Used for making comparisons, meaning 'than', 'rather than', or 'more than'

name: 予定だ
description: Expresses a plan or schedule, meaning 'plan to' or 'intend to' do something

name: ようだ
description: Expresses conjecture or appearance based on evidence, meaning 'appears', 'seems', or 'looks as if'

name: ように / ような
description: Expresses similarity or comparison, meaning 'like', 'as', or 'similar to'

name: ようになる
description: Expresses a gradual change or development, meaning 'to reach the point that' or 'to turn into'

name: ようにする
description: Expresses making an effort or ensuring something happens, meaning 'to try to' or 'to make sure that'

name: ようと思う
description: Expresses intention or planning to do something, meaning 'thinking of doing' or 'planning to'

name: ぜひ
description: Expresses strong desire or recommendation, meaning 'by all means', 'certainly', or 'definitely'

name: 全然～ない
description: Emphasizes complete negation, meaning '(not) at all' when used with negative forms

name: づらい
description: Expresses difficulty in doing something, meaning 'difficult to do' or 'hard to do'
